metaDescription: Tribulation is a Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric mod that overhauls difficulty: three-axis mob scaling, tier-gated abilities, death penalties, hardcore hearts, and soul inventory.
ogDescription: A comprehensive difficulty mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric. Three scaling axes, tier-gated abilities, death penalties, and opt-in hardcore mechanics.

hero.lede: A comprehensive difficulty overhaul for Minecraft 1.21.1 (Fabric).
hero.sub: Mobs grow stronger as you play longer, venture further, and descend deeper. Every hour survived raises the stakes with scaling stats, tier abilities, and brutal opt-in mechanics.

sections.title: Core Systems
sections.lede: Four interlocking mechanics that bend Minecraft's flat difficulty curve into an escalating gauntlet. Full feature list →

items.title: Mob Scaling
html: 21 mob types scale across health, damage, speed, armor, toughness, and follow range — independent rate and cap per stat.

items.title: Death Penalties
html: Lose 2 difficulty levels on death as relief. Shatter Shards drop rarely from scaled mobs and cut your level by 5 when consumed.

items.title: Hardcore Hearts
html: Opt-in permanent max-health loss on death. Restore lost hearts with Heart Fragment items crafted from Shatter Shards.

items.title: Soul Inventory
html: Opt-in inventory destruction on death. Only items enchanted with Soulbound survive — forcing deliberate gear choices.

sections.title: Three Scaling Axes
sections.lede: Difficulty compounds from three independent sources. Each axis contributes a factor that multiplies mob attributes.
sections.footnote: The three factors combine multiplicatively per attribute, then clamp to a global stat cap. See the formula →

items.title: Time (Player Level)
html: Every hour of playtime advances your level (0–250). The higher your level, the more stats mobs near you gain. This is the primary axis.

items.title: Distance from Spawn
html: Beyond 1000 blocks from world spawn, mobs gain bonus health, damage, armor, and toughness. Caps at +150%. Overworld-only by default.

items.title: Height (Y-Level)
html: Deviation from sea level (Y=62) in either direction adds threat — deep caves and tall peaks alike. Caps at +50%.

sections.title: Quick Install
sections.lede: Requires Fabric Loader 0.16.10+, Fabric API, and Java 21 on Minecraft 1.21.1.

items: Install Fabric Loader 0.16.10+ for Minecraft 1.21.1.
Drop tribulation-x.x.x.jar into your mods/ folder (server and client).
Launch the game. Config generates at config/tribulation.json on first run.
Adjust settings in the config file or hot-reload with /tribulation reload in-game.
blocks.note: Remove any other mob-scaling mods before installing. New to the mod? Start with the Getting Started guide.
